summary: MetaboAnnotatoR example feature table targetTable.csv contains 6 features from a LC-MS Lipidomics (ESI+) chromatogram to be annotated.
Three out of the six features were annotated to a lipid in the example annotation results.
Feature 3 has an m/z value of 468.3095 and a retention time of 82.92009 s.
The rank 1 annotation for feature 3 is LPC(14:0).
MetaboAnnotatoR provides the annotateRC function for performing annotations.
MetaboAnnotatoR can use default Lipid Positive mode libraries named LipidPos.
The annotateRC function stores results in an object with a global annotations property. The annotateRC function stores candidate annotations in a rankedResult property.
Feature 3 could be annotated to fragments of PCs containing the 14:0 fatty acyl chain with lower confidence than LPC(14:0).
